D:\\JXMYJ\\PostgreSQL\\source\\src/inclu: Datum abstime_finite(PG_FUNCTION_ARGS) { AbsoluteTime time = PG_GETARG_ABSOLUTETIME(0); bool result = (time != NOSTART_ABSTIME && time != NOEND_ABSTIME && time != INVALID_ABSTIME); PG_RETURN_BOOL(result); }
Datum date_finite(PG_FUNCTION_ARGS) { DateADT date = PG_GETARG_DATEADT(0); bool result = !DATE_NOT_FINITE(date); PG_RETURN_BOOL(result); }
Datum timestamp_finite(PG_FUNCTION_ARGS) { Timestamp timestamp = PG_GETARG_TIMESTAMP(0); bool result = !TIMESTAMP_NOT_FINITE(timestamp); PG_RETURN_BOOL(result); }
